Package com.irurueta.units

Class WeightConverter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.units.WeightConverter
  • public class WeightConverter
extends java.lang.Object
    Does weight conversions to different units. To prevent loss of accuracy, conversion should only be done as a final step before displaying weight measurements.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      (package private) static double GRAMS_PER_KILOGRAM
      Number of grams in 1 kilogram.
      (package private) static double GRAMS_PER_MEGATONNE
      Number of grams in 1 megatonne.
      (package private) static double GRAMS_PER_MICROGRAM
      Number of grams in 1 microgram.
      (package private) static double GRAMS_PER_MILLIGRAM
      Number of grams in 1 milligram.
      (package private) static double GRAMS_PER_NANOGRAM
      Number of grams in 1 nanogram.
      (package private) static double GRAMS_PER_OUNCE
      Number of grams per ounce.
      (package private) static double GRAMS_PER_PICOGRAM
      Number of grams in 1 picogram.
      (package private) static double GRAMS_PER_POUND
      Number of grams per pound.
      (package private) static double GRAMS_PER_TONNE
      Number of grams in 1 metric tonne.
      (package private) static double GRAMS_PER_UK_TON
      Number of grams in 1 UK ton.
      (package private) static double GRAMS_PER_US_TON
      Number of grams in 1 US ton.

        Constructor. Prevents instantiation of helper class.

    • Method Detail

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Weight input,
                           Weight output)
        Converts a weight to provided output weight unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input weight to be converted.
        output - output weight where result will be stored and containing output unit.

      • convertAndReturnNew

        public static Weight convertAndReturnNew​(Weight input,
                                         WeightUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a weight to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input weight to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        Returns:
        converted weight.

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Weight weight,
                           WeightUnit outputUnit)
        Converts and updates a weight to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        weight - input weight to be converted and updated.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Weight input,
                           WeightUnit outputUnit,
                           Weight result)
        Converts a weight to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input weight to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        result - weight instance where result will be stored.

      • convert

        public static java.lang.Number convert​(java.lang.Number input,
                                       WeightUnit inputUnit,
                                       WeightUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a weight value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - weight value.
        inputUnit - input weight unit.
        outputUnit - output weight unit.
        Returns:
        converted weight value.

      • convert

        public static double convert​(double input,
                             WeightUnit inputUnit,
                             WeightUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a weight value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - weight value.
        inputUnit - input weight unit.
        outputUnit - output weight unit.
        Returns:
        converted weight value.

        public static double gramToPicogram​(double gram)
        Converts provided gram value to picograms.
        Parameters:

        Returns:
